description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow with a sprawling, asymmetrical footprint set on a rectangular plot of green terrain. The structure features a complex, multi-tiered roof with deep overhangs and a combination of flat and gently sloped sections, giving it a contemporary yet residential feel. The main building is connected to a long, single-story wing, possibly a garage or auxiliary space, which extends perpendicularly from the main living area. Large windows and multiple entry points are visible, suggesting an emphasis on natural light and accessibility. The exterior appears to be finished in a combination of light-colored walls and dark roofing materials, with architectural details such as covered porches and extended eaves. The overall design is open and inviting, suitable for a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A spacious, modern bungalow with a multi-tiered dark roof, light walls, and an extended single-story wing, set on a green plot. Features large windows, deep overhangs, and a contemporary architectural style.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from a corner angle, highlighting the long wing and the main building's roof complexity.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a higher perspective, emphasizing the layered roof and the main entrance area.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front facade with prominent windows and the full length of the attached wing.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the rear and side of the bungalow, focusing on the connection between the main structure and the wing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and scattered large windows
